questions.question_text: Write short note on Bending Equation in Beam. What are merits & demerits of steel roof trusses? Write short note on Moment Area Method. Write short note on Conjugate Beam Method? What is bending moment of simply supported beam with point load & uniformly distributed load. Explain wind forces acting of steel roof trusses. What is asymmetrical section of a Beam? Define shear force and shear force diagram
Draw structural framing of industrial building.
Explain analysis of truss by method of joints.
Explain shear stress distribution in sections.
Calculate moment of resistance of steel beam having span = 8m and UDL = 40Kn/m Adopt allowable bending stress = 165 N/mm2. Modulus of section = 3060 cm3
Check steel beam ISMB600 for shear having span 6m and point load at centre 50 KN. Web thickness = 10.5 mm. Draw B.M & shear forces diagrams.
Explain Double Integration method of calculation of deflection in beams. Draw neat sketch to support your answer.
Calculate and check deflection of simply supported beam having span 7m and udl = 50Kn/m. Modulus elasticity E = 200000 N/mm2. Moment of Inertia Ixx = 728670000 mm4.
